reviews.comment:

Good service, and there wasn't much of a queue even though it was busy. The parking space is very small, but you can still get through.

reviews.comment:
Completo lugar para la atención del automóvil, taller, lubricentro, servicompras, playa de combustibles y más.. muy buena atención y profesionalismo ..se recomienda..

(Translated by Google)
A complete car service center, including a workshop, oil change station, convenience store, fuel station, and more. Excellent service and professionalism. Highly recommended.

reviews.comment:
Hoy a las 5:30 de la mañana un veterano  me atendio de mala onda no vuelvo a cargar nafta ahí además me dijo que el baño estaba cerrado

(Translated by Google)
Today at 5:30 in the morning, a veteran served me in a very rude manner. I will never fill up my gas there again. He also told me that the bathroom was closed.
